To Compel Arbitration Of Claims And Stay Judicial Proceedings; Declarations Of Barbara I Antonucci, Kristy Siegrist, Danielle Steel, And Cody Lee
Off Calendar May-16-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT DANIELLE
STEEL, TPA Co. and Cody Lee's Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Claims And Stay Judicial
Proceedings -- Granted. Action stayed pending arbitration; plaintiff's claims
for injunctive relief also stayed pending arbitration. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(REQ/301/EH) Reporter: Beldon Yee CSR #2647
